title: Ortaköy Bosphorus Breeze
description: Spend a themed day in Istanbul: Hagia Sophia, Ortaköy Square, Ortaköy Kumpir 14, The House Cafe Ortaköy.
notes: A picturesque pose, epitomized by the bridge views.
Watch the seagulls by the Bosphorus coast.
Classic roasted potatoes + Bosphorus views = perfect match.
Finish with a coffee overlooking the view.
There's free public restroom near the square.
